Explore HVAC calculators Request your report

HVAC calculators for owners who want the number first.

Fast calculators and scorecards built to show where calls, revenue, and visibility are leaking before you buy the full report.

HVAC Calculator

Phone Revenue Calculator

Most owners think they answer 90% of calls. The actual average is 68%. Every unanswered call is a job that went to a competitor. Find out the dollar amount walking out your door every month.

See your lost revenue
HVAC Calculator

Estimate Follow-Up Calculator

Most owners blame the homeowner for not calling back. The data says otherwise. Enter your estimate volume and see exactly how much revenue is dying in your outbox every year.

See the follow-up gap
HVAC Calculator

Agency Report Card

Every agency reports impressions, clicks, and cost per lead. Almost none report the number that actually matters: cost per booked job. Answer 10 questions and get a straight grade.

Grade your agency
HVAC Calculator

Revenue Per Technician Benchmarker

Most owners track total revenue. Very few track revenue per tech, the number that tells you whether your team is running at capacity or leaving jobs on the table. Enter your numbers and see exactly where you stand.

Benchmark your team
HVAC Calculator

Marketing Cost Calculator

Most HVAC companies track leads. Very few know what it costs to book a real job. Enter your numbers and see your true cost per booked job against stronger HVAC benchmarks.

Calculate your numbers
HVAC Calculator

GBP Scorecard

The map pack is one of the best free lead sources in HVAC. Most companies are giving ground to competitors on basic GBP factors they do not even know about. Score yourself on the same rubric we use for HVAC competitor teardowns.

Score your GBP
HVAC Calculator

Website Conversion Scorecard

Most HVAC websites look fine, but fail in 3 critical places: speed, mobile experience, and call friction. Answer 12 quick questions about your site and get a Conversion Leak Score with specific fixes.

Audit your website

Want the full market gap in one report?

The HVAC Local Market Report shows who is outranking you, what they are doing differently, and what that gap is likely costing you in missed calls.

Request your report
